message:
test(conformance): add live Redis diff tests for transactions, scripting, and streams

Add three new live Redis conformance tests comparing Runtime output
against vendored Redis server:
- core_transaction_live_redis_matches_runtime: MULTI/EXEC transactions
- core_scripting_live_redis_matches_runtime: Lua EVAL/EVALSHA
- core_stream_live_redis_matches_runtime: XADD/XREAD/XRANGE

These tests catch behavioral divergences that fixture-only tests miss.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
